texto: When you’re growing up, it takes a long time for you to realize that there’s something different about you. On one level, you know there’s something strange, but on another, yourself is the only thing you ever knew.
explicacao: Citação de Brooke Stevens sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When you’re growing up, it takes a long time for you to realize that there’s something different …” articula sucesso, growth, youth em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como youth.
